When calling the tool, pass a full TS program string in input key "typescript".

severity must be one of: low, medium, high, critical.
data.userPrompt:
Please audit a demo website for UI and UX issues.
Browse key pages and return a concise report with severity levels, reproducible steps, and suggested fixes.

data.stdout: {"siteUrl":"https://example.com","findings":[{"severity":"medium","title":"Low Contrast Text","description":"The navigation menu text has insufficient contrast against the background, making it difficult to read for users with visual impairments.","location":"Navigation Bar","suggestedFix":"Increase the contrast ratio of the navigation text to meet WCAG AA standards (at least 4.5:1)."},{"severity":"low","title":"Unresponsive Layout on Mobile","description":"The hero section image overflows the viewport on smaller mobile devices, causing horizontal scrolling.","location":"Hero Section","suggestedFix":"Apply 'max-width: 100%' and 'height: auto' to the hero image CSS."}],"summary":"The website has minor UI/UX issues related to accessibility and responsiveness that should be addressed to improve user experience."}

details.note: Code mode must write and execute code.

findings.title: Low visual hierarchy on hero section
findings.description: Primary heading and supporting text have similar weight and contrast, reducing scannability.
findings.suggestedFix: Increase heading size/weight and reduce secondary text prominence for clearer hierarchy.

findings.title: No explicit keyboard focus styling
findings.description: Interactive elements rely on default browser focus outline with inconsistent visibility.
findings.suggestedFix: Define a consistent, high-contrast focus ring across interactive components.

expected.summary: Site is usable but needs stronger information hierarchy and accessibility-focused interaction states.
